theHouse.title: The House of Mi-KAI
theHouse.p1: Born in the heart of Tokyo, Mi-KAI is more than a brand — it is a philosophy of light. We believe that illumination is not merely functional; it is the silent architect of atmosphere, emotion, and well-being.
theHouse.p2: Every Mi-KAI creation is a testament to the Japanese principle of Monozukuri — the art of making things with meticulous care and unwavering dedication to perfection.
theHouse.p3: Our name, 光明 (Kōmyō), means radiance — the brilliant light that reveals true beauty in every surface, every texture, every moment.

cri.title: True Color Rendering
cri.subtitle: CRI > 90
cri.desc: Experience colors as they were meant to be seen. Our CRI>90 LEDs render the full spectrum of visible light, revealing the true richness of your interiors.

glareFree.title: Glare-Free Comfort
glareFree.desc: Engineered optics eliminate harsh glare while maintaining luminous output. Your eyes rest, even after hours.

circadian.title: Circadian Harmony
circadian.desc: Tunable color temperatures align with your body's natural rhythm — warm light for evenings, crisp light for focus.

longevity.title: 40,000 Hours
longevity.desc: A decade of continuous brilliance. Our LEDs are engineered for endurance, maintaining color consistency throughout their lifespan.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.desc: Every unit undergoes rigorous testing across 12 quality checkpoints before it earns the Mi-KAI seal.

cri.title: CRI>90 Standard
cri.desc: We don't meet industry standards — we redefine them. CRI>90 is our baseline, not our ceiling.

service.title: White-Glove Service
service.desc: From consultation to installation, our dedicated team ensures a seamless, premium experience at every touchpoint.

systems.title: Intelligent Systems
systems.desc: Interior lighting, integrated systems, and sensors — engineered to work in perfect harmony with your space.

theLiving.title: Curated Luminance
theLiving.desc: Transform every room into a sanctuary of refined light. From intimate bedrooms to grand living spaces, Mi-KAI elevates the everyday into the extraordinary.

contact.title: Contact Headquarters
contact.success: Message sent successfully. We will respond shortly.

catalogue.title: The Collection
catalogue.desc: Explore our range of premium architectural LED lighting. Precision engineered for extraordinary spaces.
